content.en:
Nine Supreme Ancestral Techniques, this number is definitely a very exaggerated number for many Supreme Strength Existences.

Generally, the third-level Supreme Ancestor could not master the Nine Supreme Ancestor Techniques.

Under normal circumstances, if the cultivation is raised to a level that is difficult to improve, and then mastering four or five Supreme Ancestor Techniques, it is equivalent to the third level of the Supreme Ancestor.

However, Ye Tian had fully mastered the nine supreme ancestral techniques, and this number was definitely terrifying.

In the following years, in addition to refining countless resources to accumulate and cultivate, Ye Tian spent the rest of his time contemplating and creating the Supreme Ancestral Technique.

The long years have passed, and the years have passed one by one.

Finally, the Dark Forbidden Realm has survived the seventh Dark Calendar.

And at this time, Ye Tian's strength also soared, not only did his cultivation improve to a point where it was difficult to improve, but he also mastered a full twelve ancestral skills.

The twelve supreme ancestral techniques made Ye Tian's strength far surpass that of the ordinary third-level supreme ancestor, reaching an incredible level, but it was definitely not comparable to the invincible ancestor.

"It's getting harder and harder to fuse the ultimate ancestral technique that fits the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth and the Bone Clan's Heaven and Earth, and it's taking more and more time, and now to create one more Supreme Ancestral Technique, at least I want a Dark Calendar, and there are only two Dark Calendar Time left before the Great Tribulation. "

Ye Tian frowned.

Therefore, he could no longer cultivate in such a step-by-step manner.

"You must obtain the Origin Rules of other Exotic Heavens and Regions, and rob the crystal!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, how precious was the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal, how could other forces trade it to him?

Even if he exchanged things for things, exchanging the Origin Rules for the Origin Rules for the Origin Rules for the Origin Rules, it would not be so easy, after all, no force would want to see other forces grow.

Those forces would rather slowly collect the Origin Rule Robbery Crystals over a long period of time, rather than barter for things.

Moreover, the Origin Rule Heist Crystal will also be slowly consumed, and it is not always available.

In addition, once the powerhouses of many forces have obtained the Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal, they may directly refine and improve their cultivation, and they may not necessarily be used for enlightenment.

"I'm afraid it won't work to trade with the Bone Clan anymore, the Bone Clan's Origin Rules Robbery Crystal is useless to me, and the Bone Clan won't trade with me even if they have other Exotic Heaven and Earth Origin Rules Robbery Crystals, if you ask them, they will most likely say no. Ye Tian thought to himself.

He thought for a moment and prepared to trade with other nameless-level exotic forces or entry-level exotic forces in the Dark Forbidden Realm.

If these forces are unwilling, he will destroy their forbidden places and gates.

There are dozens of forbidden places in the Dark Forbidden Domain, which is equivalent to having dozens of exotic forces, and forces like the Bone Clan are relatively high-ranked.

There are also many foreign forces behind the forbidden lands that are only equivalent to the forces of the Sea and Sky Holy Sect, and he can easily threaten them.

Of course, these weak forces don't necessarily have the Origin Rule Treasure Crystal, which requires a certain amount of luck.

"If there is no origin rule to rob crystals, then rob some resources, I believe they will be willing to give it!" Ye Tian said coldly.

......

Jinyang River forbidden land.

This is a base opened up by an exotic force called Jinyang River Palace, similar to a big river, it is one of the top ten forbidden places among the dozens of forbidden places in the dark forbidden domain, there is not much danger, and the top ancestors can also retreat if they enter it.

This forbidden place will give birth to a treasure called Jinyang River Pearl, which is one of the treasures born from the collision of rules.

Any base opened up by an exotic force will give birth to some treasures under the collision of the rules of the two exotic worlds, and the specific treasures that will be born depend on luck.

And the treasure of Jinyang River Pearl can be used to restore strength and heal injuries, which is a good thing.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the Jinyang River Forbidden Land, but he didn't look down on the Jinyang River Pearl, he came to find the Jinyang River Palace.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian stepped into it in one step, causing turmoil in the rules.

Suddenly, the powerhouses of Jinyang River Palace noticed it and launched an attack on Ye Tian as soon as possible.

I saw a pair of hands full of scales coming across the void and killing Ye Tian.

Hum!

Ye Tian snorted coldly, and a terrifying force directly shattered these hands.

"Get out of the !!"

Ye Tian shouted, and the entire Jinyang River Forbidden Land Void was shattered, and a powerhouse named Jinyang River Palace was seriously injured and vomited blood.

"The Ancestor !!! the Strongest"

The powerhouses of Jinyang River Palace were shocked.

These of them, who only garrisoned a few top river ancestor level powerhouses, were only equivalent to top ancestors, where was Ye Tian's opponent!

Immediately, they wanted to ask for help.

Ye Tian didn't stop them and asked them to ask for help.

After all, he wanted to talk to the strongest river ancestors of the Jinyang River Palace, but these top river ancestors were not qualified to talk to him.

Soon.

The supreme river ancestor of the Jinyang River Palace crossed the door and came to the forbidden land of the Jinyang River.

Bang!!!

A humanoid fishtail figure flew out of the door.

The strong man of the Jinyang River Palace is similar to the mermaid clan and lives in the river, so the base of the Jinyang River is like a river.

"Lord Lingze River Ancestor, there is a supreme ancestor of the Dark Forbidden Realm attacking!!"

A top river ancestor asked for help.

Lingze River Ancestor saw Ye Tian and wanted to threaten Ye Tian, but the more he looked at it, the more wrong it became.

Terror!

A real horror!

He had never seen such a terrifying powerhouse, although the qi on Ye Tian's body was hidden, but the trace of qi emitted was like making him face a real great terror.

Obviously, Ye Tian was not an ordinary Supreme Ancestor.

"Your Excellency, I wonder if there is any misunderstanding between us?" said Lingze River Ancestor with a smile.

Ye Tian said coldly: "Misunderstanding? I am the strongest ancestor of the Dark Forbidden Domain, and you are a foreign force and an intruder, do you think there will be a misunderstanding?"

I saw that Ye Tian approached Lingze River Ancestor and no longer suppressed the realm aura.

Suddenly, Lingze River Ancestor understood Ye Tian's strength realm.

The third level of the Supreme Ancestor!

Oh my God, the entire Jinyang River Palace doesn't even have a second-level powerhouse of the Supreme River Ancestor, only a few first-level Supreme River Ancestors.

For Jinyang River Palace, a strong person like Ye Tian is definitely an existence that needs to be looked up to.

That is to say, Ye Tian is not the powerhouse of their exotic world, otherwise he would definitely surrender and fall to the ground one by one, where would he dare to offend!

"Respected powerhouse, you didn't even make a move immediately, you must not have come to destroy this base, did you?"

"I want to trade an Origin Rule Heist Crystal with you Jinyang River Palace!"

Ye Tian asked.
